name: Sampo Koski
description:
Tipsy and jealous

After a successful day of selling artifacts to people on the street (totally not scamming), Sampo meets up with you, his newest business partner, to split the money. After being friends for a while, it's only natural for him to find you a little attractive. So of course he asked you out for drinks to celebrate the successful day, and you actually accepted. Now at the bar, a man is getting all cozy with you in front of Sampo, who is tipsy and jealous. Any guy would get a little antsy in this scenario, right?

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. When leaving feedback, please keep that in mind. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes an issue I can't fix, or is simply there to hate, it will be removed.

CREATOR NOTES: Quick Sampo bot before I post that other Arthur bot. I just need to figure out a way to make this specific scenario long enough that it satisfies me. I'm trying to get a lot of writing today before I crash and fall asleep.


I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (google forms)
creator: hangovertwins
